description: Style NoteEvery woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Product Details Blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, three fourth sleeves and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
